name: punch-camera-smooth-follow
description: Sample camera and character positions frame-by-frame during a maximum-power punch.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=1500000000,WallLevel=99,Depth=0,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-27),Vector3.new(-2,3,-60)) p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) return true

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local RS=game:GetService('RunService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local c=p.Character local root=c.HumanoidRootPart local hum=c:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid') local head=c.Head local cam=workspace.CurrentCamera local dir=Vector3.new(root.CFrame.LookVector.X,0,root.CFrame.LookVector.Z).Unit cam.CameraType=Enum.CameraType.Scriptable cam.CameraSubject=hum cam.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(root.Position-dir*12+Vector3.new(0,4,0),root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0)) cam.Focus=CFrame.new(root.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0)) task.wait(.1) cam.CameraType=Enum.CameraType.Custom task.wait(.35) local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation local startRoot=root.Position local startCam=cam.CFrame local startDist=(cam.CFrame.Position-cam.Focus.Position).Magnitude local lastCam=cam.CFrame.Position local lastForward=0 local maxStep,maxBack,visible,inside=0,0,0,0 local clampBefore=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraGeometryClampFrames') or 0 g:SetAttribute('PunchCameraMaxAppliedStep',0) a:Invoke('Punch') for i=1,180 do RS.RenderStepped:Wait() local cp=cam.CFrame.Position maxStep=math.max(maxStep,(cp-lastCam).Magnitude) lastCam=cp local f=(root.Position-startRoot):Dot(dir) maxBack=math.max(maxBack,lastForward-f) lastForward=f local _,on=cam:WorldToViewportPoint(head.Position) if on then visible+=1 end local blocked=false for _,part in ipairs(workspace:GetPartBoundsInBox(CFrame.new(cp),Vector3.new(.3,.3,.3))) do if part:IsA('BasePart') and part.CanCollide and part.Transparency<.95 and not part:IsDescendantOf(c) then blocked=true break end end if blocked then inside+=1 end end local endDist=(cam.CFrame.Position-cam.Focus.Position).Magnitude local angle=math.deg(math.acos(math.clamp(startCam.LookVector:Dot(cam.CFrame.LookVector),-1,1))) local appliedStep=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraMaxAppliedStep') or 0 return H:JSONEncode({delay=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraFollowDelaySeconds'),travel=(root.Position-startRoot):Dot(dir),stepBounded=appliedStep<=2.65,maxStep=appliedStep,sampleMaxStep=maxStep,noSnap=maxBack<.5,maxBack=maxBack,distancePreserved=math.abs(endDist-startDist)<.05,anglePreserved=angle<.2,visibleEnough=visible/180>=.9,insideFrames=inside,geometryClear=inside==0,clamped=(g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraGeometryClampFrames') or 0)-clampBefore,type=cam.CameraType.Name,mode=g:GetAttribute('PunchCameraMode')})

steps.label: camera follow is bounded and geometry-safe
